form.formComment: Last start by 5 m when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (2:06.90) beating Harveys Tooth in MAIDEN on April 8 at $19 at the bell was leading 3.82. Must be respected.

form.formComment: Began his campaign last start running 7th (Sr2) over 1730m at this track beaten 9 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:07.40) in NR up to 48 on April 8 at $101. Hard to have.

formComments.comment: Began his campaign last start running 7th (Sr2) over 1730m at this track beaten 9 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:07.40) in NR up to 48 on April 8 at $101. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke shortly after the start and was retired from the event passing the 1700m.
Unable to secure clear running in the early stages of the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track beaten 5.5 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:07.40) in NR up to 48 on April 8 at $41. Two runs back 5th (Fr2) over 1730m at this track beaten 10 m by Fliptop Bottleshop (2:08.60) in NR up to 53 on March 27 at $71. Fully tested.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced passing the 1100m when In Lexys Words broke gait.
Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she was well back in the run when 7th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track, beaten 23 m by Hoppalongpog (2:04.20) in 2 WINs on December 17 at $16. Capable of taking this out while fresh.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten 12 m by Riverina Flash (2:01.60) in NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $5. Two runs back posted a big 16 m win as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:09.50) beating Spearhead in NR up to 39 on March 27 at $2.70. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by a nose (Sr1) at this track (2:07.40) beating Rock The Nation in NR up to 48 on April 8 at $8. Two runs back won by 1.75 m when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:08.50) beating Alta Downs in NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $7.50. Has been relentless of late and can get the job done again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung inwards after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr5) over 1730m at this track, beaten 4 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:07.40) in NR up to 48 on April 8 at $4.40. Two runs back ran on from midfield and won by a head as favourite (Fr4) at Young (2:05.50) beating Rockin Sweet in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $1.33 at the bell was 4th-6.7. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Last start by 10 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Junee (2:48.00) beating Ellava Pacer in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $1.85 at the bell was leading 4.4. Going well enough score again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Entering the home straight on the final occasion, shifted out marginally.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 7th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track beaten 24 m by Lucky Punt (2:04.50) in NR up to 47 on April 1 at $16. Before that 7th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track was leading by 4.61 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Wishas Darling (2:04.00) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $14. Others appeal more heading into this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced during the middle stages of the event.
Checked passing the 300m when Captain Pinnacle broke gait.
Out of position when the start was effected despite the driver's efforts.
Shifted up the track over concluding stages.

form.formComment: Going well. Last start by 5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Parkes (2:01.60) beating Holme Boy in NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $3.30. Worth plenty of thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke clear of interference passing the 1100m.
